# Retired developer-facing terms, enforced by .github/workflows/terminology-check.yml
#
# Format:  <case-insensitive ERE pattern>===<suggested replacement>
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
# Canonical reference: support/contributing/style-guide/terminology.mdx
#
# Scope: the check runs only on CHANGED .mdx files in a PR, and excludes
# protocol/API-reference pages and historical release notes (see the workflow).

EVM Address Account Alias===EVM Address from Public Key
EVM[ -]address alias===EVM Address from Public Key
EVM alias===EVM Address
Account Number Alias===EVM Address from Account ID
Public Key Account Alias===remove the concept (public-key alias is retired)
public key alias===remove or rephrase (public-key alias is retired)
